name: Puppet Stage Unveiled
descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains Aliemus equal to [Arg2]% of her Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} changes to: "Pull a chosen Command Card out from {Ultra Space} and into your hand; it triggers +1 time when played. The next Command Card played triggers {Dimension Shuttle}."

patch.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains Aliemus equal to [Arg2]% of her Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} changes to: "Pull a chosen Command Card out from {Ultra Space} and into your hand; it triggers +1 time when played. For each enemy, deal {Fixed DMG} to them equal to 50% of their {Final Verdict}. Shield and DMG Amplification gained from Arachne's next Exalt +50%. The next Command Card played triggers {Dimension Shuttle}."
